author: Aki Gogikar (OneNewAI)
name: Ternary Reasoner — Capsule-Feedback Universal Transformer
blurb: Ternary Reasoner: 12L/768d ternary U-Net with iterative Hadamard-gated backward correction, recurrent capsule state, XSA, LeakyReLU², BigramHash, Partial RoPE, VRL, EMA, GPTQ-lite, n-gram cache, sliding eval, temp scaling, and legal TTT. ~87M ternary params in ~12MB.
